data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Web interface minimizes choices to reduce decision time for users.

data.title: Fitts’ Law
data.description: Interactive elements are sized and positioned for easy accessibility.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Related elements are placed closer together to enhance usability and visual comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Grouping of similar functions and content

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Chunking of information into digestible groups to aid memory retention.
data.technical_spec: Content sectioned with appropriate headings and subheadings

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Important information is positioned strategically where users are most likely to remember it.
data.technical_spec: Call-to-action buttons placed at the top and bottom of pages
